payload.query: In recent years, area studies approaches to comparative politics have come under attack by proponents of large-N, cross-national approaches. Evaluate the role of area studies in comparative politics and address the challenge posed by cross-national approaches. Are area studies dead? Should they be? Be certain your answer makes specific reference to one or more regions of the world.

articles.title: Read the Decision
articles.abstract: A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration from ending Temporary Protected Status for more than 350,000 Haitians in the United States.
articles.snippet: A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration from ending Temporary Protected Status for more than 350,000 Haitians in the United States.

articles.title: Read the document
articles.abstract: In a 220-page report to FEMA last year, Kerr County said a flood was likely within a year, and could exceed historical records.

articles.title: Read the Court Ruling on Trump’s Use of the Alien Enemies Act
articles.abstract: The ruling was a setback for the Trump administration on the mass deportation of immigrants, one of its domestic policy goals.
articles.snippet: The ruling was a setback for the Trump administration on the mass deportation of immigrants, one of its domestic policy goals.

articles.title: Read the Full ‘Make America Healthy Again’ Report
articles.abstract: The White House released an expansive report that blames a crisis of chronic disease in children on ultraprocessed foods, chemical exposures, lack of physical activity, stress and excessive use of prescription drugs.
articles.snippet: The White House released an expansive report that blames a crisis of chronic disease in children on ultraprocessed foods, chemical exposures, lack of physical activity, stress and excessive use of prescription drugs.

articles.title: Growing Up With A.I.: A Multimedia Challenge for Teenagers and Educators

articles.snippet: Show us — in words or images, audio or video — how this technology is affecting you and the teenagers you know. Contest dates: Sept. 10-Oct. 22, 2025.

articles.title: A.I. in New York Schools: What Lies Ahead?

articles.title: Trump Says He Should Have Role in Choosing Iran’s Next Leader
articles.abstract: The president’s comments were the most detailed he has been about his vision of a U.S. role in creating a new government in Tehran.

articles.title: The Coming Iranian Revolution
articles.abstract: Ayatollah Khomeini’s bait-and-switch game in the early years of the Islamic regime turned many of the people against it. They’ve been fighting the revolution since.
